== Notes for [[Item:Q112421|Q112421]] ==

Muhammad ibn 'Abd Allâh al-Qurtubi

b. circa 876

Father 'Abd Allâh ibn Muhammad, amir al-Qurtubi1 b. 848, d. December 912

Mother Oneca Fortunez de Navarra1 b. circa 847

Of the Umayyad. Muhammad ibn 'Abd Allâh al-Qurtubi was born circa 876. He was the son of 'Abd Allâh ibn Muhammad, amir al-Qurtubi and Oneca Fortunez de Navarra.1

Family

Child

'Abd al-Rahmân III an-Nasir li-din Allah ibn Muhammad, khalifa al-Qurtubi+ b. Jan 891, d. b 15 Oct 9611,2

Citations

[S187] Royal Genealogy Database, online http://www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/public/genealogy/

[S653] PoH, online http://www.friesian.com/

Abd-ar-Rahman III

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Abd-ar-Rahman III succeeded his grandfather ʿAbd Allāh, one of the Andalusian Umayyads, who had killed his father Muhammad.

AM Alonso Zaldivar's 28th great uncle.

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
